Rio Grande 1200 measurement 2 of 2 to confirm River Ray results. Rio Grande not suitable to river conditions, < 50% of flow measured, BT lost  briefly during loop test, moving bed detected. Two more loop tests repeated after increasing ADCP depth, same results, accepted with warning the >5% BT lost during loop. GPS data OK, but not perfect either. Q results from BT (with loop correction), GGA and VTG are within 1 % of eachother. BT used as primary data source for the measurement. Sources:Import,Manual

River Ray measurement 1 of 2 to confirm yesterday's River Ray measurement that was ~7% off of the existing curve.
